overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk market alley at night, passing food stalls and vendors, ascending to an upper level, and entering a retro-style diner. The environment features heavy neon lighting in pink, blue, and cyan tones, Japanese-inspired red paper lanterns, and a mix of futuristic and gritty urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market alley with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow neon-lit alley, observing food stalls and pedestrians on both sides

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with blue lighting on building facade
cluster of traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns hanging above walkway
tree with pink illuminated blossoms visible in the distance
wooden and metal food stall with awning and lighting
industrial metal scaffolding structure along right wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, surrounded by vibrant neon signs in blue and pink, red paper lanterns, and various food stalls. The ground is wet asphalt reflecting the colorful lights, with a cherry blossom tree visible in the distance and moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall area with active vendor service

events.description: slows down to observe vendor working at food preparation counter
approaches concrete stairs leading to upper level alley

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe vendor preparing food at stall before continuing toward stairs

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue and orange jacket working behind food counter, preparing items

entered.detail: detailed food service counter with plates and cooking equipment
illuminated menu screen displaying food items above the stall
concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
bright red vending machine with illuminated interface

segments.scene_description: Approaching a specific food stall with an active vendor preparing meals behind a counter. The camera observes the vendor's actions before moving past the stall toward a concrete staircase. A red vending machine becomes visible on the left as the cherry blossom tree disappears from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper service alley with homeless encampment

events.description: ascends concrete stairs to upper level walkway
enters doorway from alley into indoor diner space

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs and through narrow upper alley, passing individuals sitting against walls

notable_agents.action: person sitting on cardboard against wall near trash bags
person sitting on steps near large ventilation grate

entered.detail: large industrial metal ventilation grate on wall
wall covered in graffiti and street art including text reading NO REGRETS
makeshift sitting area with cardboard boxes and bags
doorway entrance to Tom's Diner with light spilling out

segments.scene_description: Ascending concrete stairs to an upper level alleyway that is darker and more enclosed. The area features a large ventilation grate, graffiti-covered walls, and a small homeless encampment with people sitting on cardboard. The camera approaches a doorway leading into a warmly lit diner.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro-style diner interior with checkered floor

events.description: lighting shifts from dark neon exterior to warm yellow interior lighting
walks past diner counter and continues toward back seating area

agents.ego_description: entering diner and walking past counter with red stools, observing patrons seated in booths

notable_agents.action: woman in bright pink jacket and white hat sitting at diner counter
patrons seated in red vinyl booth eating and conversing

entered.detail: distinctive black and white checkered tile floor pattern
long curved diner counter with green facade and white top
classic red vinyl upholstered booth seating along left wall
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures on ceiling
circular neon sign reading Tom's Diner on back wall

segments.scene_description: Inside Tom's Diner, the environment shifts dramatically to warm artificial lighting with a black-and-white checkered floor, green Formica counter, and red vinyl booths. The camera walks past a woman in a pink jacket sitting at the counter and patrons in booths, with fluorescent lights illuminating the retro interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-drenched market alley into the warm, retro interior of a diner. It begins by gliding through a narrow street of wet asphalt reflecting blue and pink neon signs and red paper lanterns, passing food stalls and a distant cherry blossom tree. As the camera approaches a vendor preparing meals, the scene shifts away from the market bustle toward a red vending machine and a set of concrete stairs. The movement then ascends into a darker, more enclosed upper alleyway characterized by graffiti-covered walls and a homeless encampment before turning toward a glowing doorway. Finally, the environment transforms dramatically as the camera enters Tom's Diner, moving across a black-and-white checkered floor past red vinyl booths and a green Formica counter under warm fluorescent lighting.
